title: address_part returning owned String is correct
description: message.rs address_part() returns String, not Cow<str>. All three match arms produce a value that may or may not be a substring of the input: All calls bare_address() which may strip display names (requiring owned), LocalPart and Domain always produce a substring via to_string(). Returning Cow would add complexity for minimal gain since callers immediately pass the result to apply_match which takes &str. Correct as-is.
